brand.campaign: Tuyen dung ky su tu dong hoa
brand.role: Lap trinh - van hanh - toi uu day chuyen san xuat
brand.tagline: Phu hop poster cho nha may, day chuyen, robot va he thong dieu khien

hero.headline: Phat trien cung day chuyen thong minh va he thong tu dong
hero.subheadline: Su dung cho cac don lap dat PLC, cam bien, tu dien, robot cong nghiep

companySection.title: Ten cong ty
companySection.intro: Cong ty chuyen ve he thong tu dong hoa cho nha may, day chuyen va trung tam van hanh.
bullets: Moi truong ky thuat gan voi san xuat thuc te
Co the thay bang anh robot, day chuyen, tu dien hoac phong dieu khien
Phu hop voi poster tuyen ky su va nhan vien van hanh

jobSection.title: Noi dung cong viec
jobSection.intro: Them them bullets neu can, app se tu tang dau dong trong cung mot khung.
bullets: Lap dat va dau noi he thong dieu khien tu dong
Kiem tra PLC, cam bien, relay va thiet bi ngoai vi
Phoi hop lap trinh va test day chuyen
Ho tro bao tri va toi uu van hanh

cards.title: He thong hien dai
cards.description: Lam viec voi tu dien, robot, bang dieu khien va day chuyen tu dong.

cards.title: Dao tao OJT
bullets: Doc so do va thao tac

cards.title: Phat trien chuyen mon
cards.description: Tich luy kinh nghiem thuc te ve lap dat, van hanh va cai tien he thong.

growthSection.title: Dinh huong phat trien sau khi vao cong ty

steps.title: Lam quen
steps.description: Hoc he thong va quy trinh

steps.title: Thuc hanh
steps.description: Ho tro lap dat va test

steps.title: Nang cao
steps.description: Xu ly loi va toi uu

traits.title: Ung vien phu hop
bullets: Thich may moc va he thong
Can than va co tinh ky luat

majorSection.title: Chuyen nganh tuyen dung
majors: Dieu khien va ky thuat lien quan
notes: Neu can poster cho robot cong nghiep, co the doi hero image sang anh canh tay robot.
